title: colombiana ruscaria
intro: Colombiana ruscaria, also known as Rusca or Ruscaria, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to South America. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of limonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and has been used to treat various conditions such as arthritis, wounds, and skin infections. Ruscaria can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and as a natural remedy for fever reduction.
